brief_html: Response to a member rank change request.
remarks_html:
Response to a member rank change request.

Status is one of the Clan Message Codes:

  • 0x00: Successfully changed member rank
  • 0x01: Failed to change member rank
  • 0x02: Too soon because the target user has not been a member long enough (must be one week old)
  • 0x07: Not authorized because you are not the leader or an officer
  • 0x08: Not allowed because the target's current or new rank is not lower than yours

comments.content_html: 0x08 is also received when the specified user is not in the clan.
